properties.docComment:
Search for a delegates-chain between p and q. An delegates-chain between p and q is a Principal array a of length L such that 

 
      a[L-1] == q
      a[L-1] delegates to a[L-2]
      ...
      a[1] delegates to a[0]
      a[0] == p
. Thus, a valid delegate chain between p and q implies that p acts for q. @param p @param q @return A delegates-chain between p and q, or null if non can be found.
